title: Tasty Churro Bites
description: A delicious dessert made with toasted tortilla and churros. Crunchy on the outside and soft on the inside, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: 2. Cut the tortilla into small pieces and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
3. In a bowl, mix the toasted tortilla with the chopped churros.
4. Add the mexican seasoning and mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
